long_description: Midnight is a mobile app for crypto-native traders and curious tech enthusiasts who want to stay informed in 60 seconds. Swipe through AI-summarized headlines from the top crypto and AI news sources, watch the market in real time, and bet on prediction markets — all in one dark, typographic interface built for Seeker. Features: vertical swipe feed with Gemini-written 60-word summaries, live top-20 crypto prices, Jupiter-powered prediction markets with one-tap bets and claims, Mobile Wallet Adapter for Phantom/Solflare/Backpack, optional Seeker Genesis Token badge for device holders, and push notifications for breaking news and position settlements.
